description:
❤️‍🔥🔥•{I promise it was an accident, this time the chocolate is free of aphromaniac... Was it?}🔥❤️‍🔥

Preview: Leo wanted to apologize while also giving you his Valentine's gift. This time he check the chocolate and there was nothing there, he also planned this for a long time. He hoped you'll like what he has in store

It's self-indulgence gift but who doesn't want a telescope for a gift... It's cool okay?
